name: TalkHead

gap_notes: No verified official docs URL yet.
No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet -- api.talkhead.ai/openapi.json and /docs both 404.

surfaces.name: TalkHead API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health on api.talkhead.ai returning application liveness (observed plain-text response: Healthy). Served on the TalkHead subnet API host documented in the talkhead-subnet repository README for miner and validator submission flows.

surfaces.name: TalkHead minimum compute requirements
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth YAML miner and validator minimum hardware specification published at the root of the official talkheadai/talkhead-executor repository as min_compute.yml. Documents baseline CPU, GPU (10GB+ VRAM, CUDA 8.6+), memory, storage, OS, and bandwidth floors for SN108 TalkHead talking-head model evaluation. Linked from the talkhead-subnet README as the official executor/scoring repo.

surfaces.name: TalkHead validator W&B dashboard
surfaces.notes: Public Weights & Biases project for SN108 TalkHead validator runs (entity talkhead-ai, project talkhead-subnet; 650+ logged runs). Declared as the subnet's default W&B target in the official talkheadai/talkhead-subnet config.py (WANDB_ENTITY_DEFAULT = 'talkhead-ai', WANDB_PROJECT_NAME_DEFAULT = 'talkhead-subnet', netuid = 108). Publicly readable, no auth.

surfaces.name: TalkHead website
surfaces.notes: Official SN108 TalkHead website -- verified live 2026-07-16.

surfaces.name: TalkHead source repository
surfaces.notes: Official SN108 TalkHead source repository -- verified live 2026-07-16.

notes: First maintainer review for SN108. Added website + source-repo surfaces (previously only cited via top-level fields) and fixed 3 missing probe blocks on the existing surfaces. No OpenAPI/Swagger schema or additional API routes found.
